overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person walk from the desert badlands toward Night City. The scene transitions from a roadside with red rock formations to a busy urban intersection and finally into a futuristic city sidewalk with holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers. Golden hour lighting creates long shadows across the asphalt as pedestrians crowd the crosswalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert roadside with red rock badlands

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the road edge toward the intersection, with red rock formations on the left

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock formation characteristic of desert badlands terrain
white industrial structure built into the red rock cliffside
low-rise residential buildings with orange and yellow facades
futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon
tall traffic signal pole with red lights visible

segments.scene_description: Walking along a desert roadside with massive red rock formations on the left and suburban houses on the right. The camera moves steadily forward toward a distant intersection, with the futuristic Night City skyline visible far ahead. Sparse vegetation lines the dirt verge beside the asphalt road.

events.description: steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane road
large group of pedestrians crosses simultaneously from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection surrounded by crowds of pedestrians moving in the same direction

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection ahead of the crossing pedestrians

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
industrial oil drilling rig visible across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a busy intersection as the camera enters the crosswalk. Dense crowds of pedestrians walk in the same direction across the multi-lane asphalt. A black sedan drives through the intersection while an industrial oil pumpjack becomes visible on the far right. The red rock cliffs fade into the distance on the left.

events.description: futuristic flying vehicle descends and passes overhead from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection as a flying car passes overhead, approaching the far sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic flying car descending and passing overhead, moving toward the left side of the frame

entered.detail: futuristic white and black flying car hovering above the intersection
concrete sidewalk curb on the far side of the intersection
tall palm trees lining the urban street ahead

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the intersection, a futuristic flying vehicle suddenly descends and passes overhead, highlighting the advanced technology of the setting. The camera approaches the far sidewalk where palm trees and towering futuristic skyscrapers dominate the right side. The red rock badlands disappear from view as the urban environment takes over.

events.description: steps onto the sidewalk and passes the Sequoia street sign

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past pedestrians and digital signage, moving deeper into the urban area

entered.detail: red and white street sign mounted on a pole reading 'Sequoia'
large digital billboard displaying 'NIGHT CITY PUBLIC TRANSIT' and other advertisements
large holographic advertisement projection floating near the buildings

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera moves along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and futuristic architecture. A red 'Sequoia' street sign marks the location as the camera passes digital advertising screens and holographic billboards. The futuristic skyscrapers of Night City loom large on the right, creating a dense urban canyon atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the desolate red rock badlands into the dense, neon-lit urban core of Night City. It begins along a desert roadside flanked by massive red formations and sparse suburban houses, moving steadily toward a distant skyline. As the camera enters a busy intersection, the natural cliffs fade into the background and are replaced by dense crowds of pedestrians and a passing black sedan. The scene then shifts as a futuristic flying vehicle descends overhead, signaling a complete transition from the wilderness to an environment dominated by towering skyscrapers and palm trees. Finally, the camera moves onto a concrete sidewalk, passing a red Sequoia street sign and holographic billboards that create a claustrophobic urban canyon.
